sheetPanel.contextBuilderNotes: Build `drawbackPanel` in character-sheet `_prepareContext` for OW actors only. Walk `system.regimentDrawbacks` and resolve each id to a `RegimentDrawback` descriptor (compendium lookup via the boot-time resync / uuidNameCache — Direction #7: do NOT hardcode drawback names or refund tables in `src/`). Pass the resolved descriptors to `applyDrawbacksToBudget(baseBudget=12, drawbacks)` for `appliedRefund` / `adjustedBudget`, and to `mergeDrawbackPenalties(drawbacks)` for the merged penalty surface. Convert `merged.characteristics` (Record) to `[{key,value}]` for handlebars. `hasPenaltyRow = any of characteristics.length / skills.length / talents.length / wounds / logistics / kitModifier is truthy`. For the roster: `roster = system.multiComradeRoster ? { present:true, primaryId, additionalIds, totalCount: 1 + additionalIds.length } : { present:false, primaryId:'', additionalIds:[], totalCount: 1 }`.
